home.aboutDescription: I'm a Tech Generalist and Solopreneur who enjoys solving problems and building things end-to-end. I focus on analysis and growth strategies — turning data into insights and insights into action.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Tech Generalist with 5+ years of experience in full-stack development, AI integration, and SEO optimization. Based in Bangkok, Thailand.
about.myStoryContent1: Hello, I'm Book (Chaowalit Greepoke)—a Tech Generalist specializing in website development, AI development, and SEO with strong website analysis skills. I have experience working with Shopify, React.js, Next.js, and utilizing tools like Google Analytics to analyze websites and extract insights that help clients' sites grow and reach a wider audience.
about.myStoryContent2: Additionally, I have expertise in analyzing data from various social media platforms to optimize marketing strategies for greater effectiveness. My background in electronics and data center operations has given me a unique perspective on both hardware and software solutions.
about.technicalSkillsDescription: Technologies and tools I work with regularly
about.funFactsDescription: A few things about me outside of coding

projects.footerDescription: Every project is a standalone Next.js app deployed independently on Vercel.

business.workTogetherDesc: Whether you need AI integration, full-stack development, or strategic consulting - I'm here to help your business grow. Let's discuss how we can create value together!

blog.authorBio: Tech Generalist from Bangkok, Thailand with expertise in AI integration, full-stack development, and SEO optimization. I love sharing knowledge and helping developers build innovative solutions with modern technologies.

about_fitness.heroStickNote: How <yellow>fitness principles</yellow> shape my approach to <pink>problem-solving</pink> and <green>building sustainable solutions</green>
about_fitness.philosophySubtitle: How fitness shapes my tech mindset
about_fitness.progressiveOverloadContent: Just like in fitness, I believe in <blue>progressive overload</blue> in learning new technologies. I gradually increase the complexity of projects I take on, ensuring steady growth without burnout. Whether it's mastering a new framework or understanding complex AI concepts, consistency beats intensity.
about_fitness.recoveryReflectionContent: Recovery days in fitness taught me the importance of <yellow>stepping back and reflecting</yellow>. In my work, I regularly take time to review code, analyze project outcomes, and plan improvements. This prevents technical debt and ensures long-term sustainability.
about_fitness.routineSubtitle: How I stay physically and mentally sharp
about_fitness.benefit2: Better stress management during tight deadlines
about_fitness.benefit3: Improved focus during long coding sessions
about_fitness.benefit4: Higher energy levels throughout the day
about_fitness.benefit5: Better sleep quality for cognitive recovery
about_fitness.goalsSubtitle: Data-driven approach to fitness, just like in tech
about_fitness.lessonsSubtitle: Principles I apply from gym to code
about_fitness.compoundContent: <pink>Compound exercises</pink> work multiple muscle groups efficiently, just like good system architecture addresses multiple concerns with elegant solutions. I focus on building systems that solve multiple problems rather than one-off fixes.
about_fitness.formTitle: Form Over Weight = Code Quality Over Speed
about_fitness.formContent: Perfect form with lighter weights prevents injury and builds better habits. Similarly, <green>writing clean, maintainable code</green> is more valuable than rushing to meet deadlines with technical debt.
about_fitness.trackingContent: I log every workout with sets, reps, and weights. This same <blue>data-driven approach</blue> applies to tracking project metrics, user analytics, and performance optimization in my development work.
about_fitness.solopreneurSubtitle: Why physical health is crucial for independent work
about_fitness.solopreneurDescription: As a solopreneur, I am both my greatest asset and my single point of failure. Maintaining physical fitness isn't just about health—it's about business continuity and peak performance.
about_fitness.phys1: Reduced back pain from long coding sessions
about_fitness.phys2: Higher energy levels for client meetings

about_tech.heroStickNote: From <highlight>hardware tinkering</highlight> to <highlight>AI systems</highlight> — the evolution of a <highlight>Tech Generalist</highlight>
about_tech.timelineSubtitle: Key milestones in my technical evolution
about_tech.milestone1Content: Started with electronics at Chitralada Technology Institute. Learned circuit analysis, microcontroller programming, and digital systems. This hardware foundation taught me how computers really work at the lowest level.
about_tech.milestone2Content: Worked in data centers and ISP operations. Learned about scalable infrastructure, network protocols, and how the internet actually works. This experience shapes how I think about performance and reliability in software systems.
about_tech.milestone3Content: Transitioned into web development and digital marketing. Self-taught React, Next.js, and SEO. Started with Shopify sites and grew into full-stack applications. This is where I discovered my love for solving business problems with technology.
about_tech.milestone4Content: Deep dive into AI/ML with RAG systems, LangChain, and multi-agent architectures. Combining full-stack development with AI to create intelligent applications. This is where my generalist approach really pays off.
about_tech.pivotalSubtitle: Key decisions and discoveries that shaped my path
about_tech.moment1Content: Spent 6 hours debugging a simple circuit that wouldn't work. When I finally found the loose connection, the satisfaction was incredible. That's when I knew I loved problem-solving and would chase that feeling forever.
about_tech.moment2Content: Built my first website to showcase electronics projects. Seeing people from around the world visit and interact with something I created was mind-blowing. The reach and impact potential of web development convinced me to make the transition.
about_tech.moment3Content: First experimented with GPT-3 API in early 2021. Realized this wasn't just another tool—it was a fundamental shift in how software could work. Started learning ML/AI seriously to stay ahead of the curve.
about_tech.moment4Content: Decided to become a solopreneur after realizing I could combine my technical skills with business needs. The freedom to choose projects, learn continuously, and directly impact clients' success is incredibly fulfilling.
about_tech.philosophySubtitle: How my journey shaped my approach to technology
about_tech.philosophy1Content: My electronics background makes me think about <highlight>performance, power consumption, and constraints</highlight> even in software. I naturally consider resource usage, optimization, and failure modes—habits that lead to more robust applications.
about_tech.philosophy2Content: Having worked in data centers, I understand <highlight>how code translates to actual hardware</highlight>. This makes me conscious of deployment environments, scaling bottlenecks, and operational concerns from the early stages of development.
about_tech.philosophy3Content: My journey through different industries taught me that <highlight>technology should serve business goals</highlight>, not exist for its own sake. I choose tools and architectures based on actual needs, not just what's trendy or technically interesting.
about_tech.stackSubtitle: Tools and technologies I'm actively using in 2024-2025
about_tech.nextSubtitle: Where technology is taking me next
about_tech.road1Content: I see a future where <highlight>AI augments every step of the development process</highlight>. Not just code generation, but intelligent testing, automated optimization, and self-healing systems. I'm positioning myself to be at the forefront of this transformation.
about_tech.road2Content: My electronics background makes me excited about <highlight>edge computing and IoT</highlight>. As AI models get smaller and hardware gets more powerful, there will be incredible opportunities to build intelligent systems that work offline and respond instantly.
about_tech.road3Content: I want to help others make similar transitions. <highlight>Creating educational content and mentoring</highlight> the next generation of developers who can bridge hardware and software, technical and business, local and global perspectives.

about_creative.heroStickNote: Where <yellow>technology meets artistry</yellow> and <pink>innovation blends with expression</pink>
about_creative.philosophy1Title: Form Follows Function, Beauty Enhances Both
about_creative.philosophy1Content: I believe that <green>beautiful design isn't just decoration</green>—it's functional. Good design reduces cognitive load, improves user experience, and makes complex systems more approachable. Every color choice, spacing decision, and interaction pattern serves a purpose.
about_creative.philosophy2Content: Working within technical constraints or business requirements often leads to my most creative solutions. <blue>Limitations force innovation</blue>—whether it's designing a responsive layout that works across all devices or creating an intuitive interface for complex data.
about_creative.toolsSubtitle: Creative tools that complement my development skills
about_creative.project1Desc: Making complex analytics beautiful and understandable
about_creative.project1Content: Created animated dashboard components that transform boring spreadsheet data into engaging visual stories. Used D3.js and custom CSS animations to make business metrics come alive.
about_creative.project2Desc: Cohesive visual languages for digital products
about_creative.project2Content: Developed complete design systems including typography scales, color palettes, and component libraries that maintain brand consistency across web and mobile platforms.
about_creative.project3Desc: Details that delight users and enhance usability
about_creative.project3Content: Crafted subtle hover effects, loading animations, and transition states that provide feedback and guide users through complex workflows without being distracting.
about_creative.process1Content: I gather inspiration from <yellow>diverse sources</yellow> — architecture, nature, minimalist art, and even street photography. I maintain a collection of design patterns and color combinations that catch my eye.
about_creative.process2Content: Before touching any digital tools, I <pink>sketch ideas on paper</pink>. This helps me think through user flows and information hierarchy without getting distracted by colors or fancy effects.
about_creative.process3Content: I create <green>interactive prototypes</green> to test ideas with real users. This reveals usability issues early and validates design decisions before development begins.
about_creative.process4Content: Design is never finished on the first try. I <blue>embrace feedback</blue> and continuously refine based on user behavior data and stakeholder input.
about_creative.insp1Content: Street photography and architectural details teach me about composition, lighting, and visual hierarchy.
about_creative.insp2Content: Less is more. Scandinavian design and Japanese aesthetics influence my approach to clean, functional interfaces.
about_creative.insp3Content: Fibonacci sequences, organic curves, and natural color palettes provide endless inspiration for digital designs.
about_creative.techSubtitle: How creative thinking improves my development
about_creative.tech1Content: My design background means I always <yellow>start with the user experience</yellow> when architecting systems. I think about information architecture, user flows, and edge cases before writing the first line of code.
about_creative.tech2Content: Creative exercises train lateral thinking. When stuck on a technical problem, I often <pink>apply design thinking methods</pink>—brainstorming wildly, then constraining solutions, or approaching from completely different angles.
about_creative.tech3Content: I believe code can be beautiful. <green>Clean architecture, consistent naming, and elegant solutions</green> have an aesthetic quality that makes codebases more maintainable and enjoyable to work with.

about_growth.heroStickNote: <yellow>Continuous learning</yellow> and <pink>self-reflection</pink> that shapes my approach to <green>technology and life</green>
about_growth.philosophySubtitle: Principles that guide my personal development
about_growth.philosophy1Content: Every challenge is an opportunity to grow. Whether it's learning a new programming language, understanding a complex business domain, or developing leadership skills, I approach each with <blue>curiosity over fear</blue>. The discomfort of not knowing is temporary—the growth is permanent.
about_growth.philosophy2Content: I've learned to <yellow>reframe failure as data</yellow>. Each mistake provides insights that accelerate learning. In both personal projects and client work, I prefer rapid prototyping and iteration over perfectionism that delays feedback.
about_growth.philosophy3Content: While goals provide direction, <pink>systems create lasting change</pink>. Instead of "I want to be an AI expert," I focus on "I will spend 1 hour daily learning AI concepts." This shift from outcomes to processes has been transformative.
about_growth.techGrowthItem1: Advanced AI/ML model training and deployment
about_growth.methodsTitle: Learning Methods That Work for Me
about_growth.methodsSubtitle: How I effectively acquire and retain new knowledge
about_growth.method1Desc: Learn by doing, not just reading
about_growth.method1Content: I create small projects for every new concept I learn. Want to understand GraphQL? Build a simple API. Learning about machine learning? Train a model on a dataset I care about. Building cements understanding.
about_growth.method2Desc: The best way to learn is to teach
about_growth.method2Content: I write detailed documentation and tutorials for everything I learn. This forces me to understand concepts deeply enough to explain them clearly. Sometimes I teach colleagues or create content to share knowledge.
about_growth.method3Content: I actively look for connections between different fields. How do design principles apply to code architecture? What can fitness teach about building habits? This cross-pollination often leads to innovative solutions.
about_growth.reflectionSubtitle: How I maintain clarity and direction
about_growth.reflection1Content: Every Friday, I review the week: What went well? What could improve? What did I learn? <green>This practice prevents me from just reacting</green> to daily demands and helps maintain strategic focus.
about_growth.reflection2Content: Once monthly, I step back for bigger picture reflection: Are my projects aligned with my values? What patterns am I noticing? <blue>This helps course-correct</blue> before small issues become big problems.
about_growth.reflection3Content: I document important decisions with my reasoning at the time. Months later, I review: What worked? What didn't? <yellow>This improves my decision-making process</yellow> over time by learning from both successes and mistakes.
about_growth.reflection4Content: Daily meditation isn't just relaxation—it's <pink>training for awareness</pink>. It helps me notice thought patterns, emotional reactions, and biases that might otherwise operate unconsciously.
about_growth.lessonsSubtitle: Insights that have shaped my worldview and approach
about_growth.lesson1Content: Small, consistent improvements compound exponentially. 1% better each day leads to 37x improvement over a year. This applies to skills, relationships, health, and financial growth.
about_growth.lesson2Title: Comfort Zone is the Danger Zone
about_growth.lesson2Content: When I'm too comfortable, I'm not growing. The most transformative periods of my life have been when I deliberately chose discomfort—learning new technologies, taking on challenging projects, or starting my solopreneur journey.
about_growth.lesson3Content: Your network determines your opportunities, learning speed, and impact. I invest heavily in relationships—not for short-term gain, but because humans naturally want to help those they know and trust.
about_growth.lesson4Content: Everything else—career, relationships, creativity—depends on physical and mental health. Neglecting health for short-term productivity gains is always a losing trade in the long run.
about_growth.futureSubtitle: Where I'm heading in the next 3-5 years
about_growth.vision1Content: As I grow my consulting practice, I want to develop skills in <green>building and leading distributed teams</green>. This includes remote team management, cross-cultural communication, and creating systems that help others do their best work.
about_growth.vision2Content: Technical skills got me here, but <blue>business strategy will determine impact</blue>. I'm focusing on understanding market dynamics, competitive positioning, and how to identify and capitalize on emerging opportunities.
about_growth.vision3Content: I want to contribute more to the tech community through <yellow>writing, speaking, and teaching</yellow>. Sharing knowledge not only helps others but also forces deeper understanding and creates valuable connections.

about_trading.heroDescription: My journey from traditional trading to building AI-powered investment systems. Exploring the intersection of finance, technology, and data-driven decision making.
about_trading.philosophySubtitle: My approach to markets and risk management
about_trading.philosophy1Content: Risk management is the foundation of all trading decisions. Position sizing, stop losses, and portfolio diversification are non-negotiable.
about_trading.philosophy2Content: Every trade must be backed by data and analysis. Technical indicators, fundamental analysis, and market sentiment all play crucial roles.
about_trading.philosophy3Content: Markets evolve constantly. Staying updated with new strategies, tools, and market conditions is essential for long-term success.
about_trading.philosophy4Content: Leveraging AI and machine learning for pattern recognition, predictive analytics, and automated trading systems.
about_trading.experienceSubtitle: My journey through different markets and strategies
about_trading.exp1Content: Started with Bitcoin and Ethereum, expanded to altcoins and DeFi protocols. Focus on technical analysis, on-chain metrics, and market sentiment analysis.
about_trading.exp2Content: Trading major currency pairs and commodities like gold, silver, and oil. Emphasis on macroeconomic analysis and inter-market relationships.
about_trading.exp3Content: Focus on technology stocks, ETFs, and options strategies. Combining fundamental analysis with technical indicators.
about_trading.toolsSubtitle: Technology stack for trading and analysis
about_trading.visionSubtitle: Building the future of algorithmic trading
about_trading.vision1Content: Developing predictive models using LSTM networks, gradient boosting algorithms, and ensemble methods for price prediction and pattern recognition.
about_trading.vision2Content: Creating algorithmic trading bots that can execute trades based on predefined criteria, risk parameters, and market conditions without human intervention.
about_trading.vision3Content: Integrating natural language processing to analyze news articles, social media, and market sentiment to inform trading decisions.
about_trading.vision4Content: Implementing AI-driven risk assessment and portfolio optimization to dynamically adjust position sizes and stop losses based on market volatility.
about_trading.futureSubtitle: Exciting developments in AI-driven trading systems
about_trading.proj1Content: Machine learning model for predicting cryptocurrency price movements using technical indicators and market sentiment data.
about_trading.proj2Content: AI-powered trading bot for executing trades across multiple exchanges with real-time risk management and performance monitoring.
about_trading.proj3Content: Advanced portfolio optimization tool using modern portfolio theory and AI-driven asset allocation strategies.
about_trading.proj4Content: NLP-powered tool for analyzing market sentiment from news, social media, and financial reports to inform trading decisions.
about_trading.ctaText: Interested in discussing trading strategies, AI applications in finance, or collaboration opportunities?
